scenario: Customer has a Health Basic policy active for 40 days and is claiming hospitalization expenses. The policy has a 60-day waiting period for hospitalization claims.
Customer has a Health Premium policy active for 120 days and is claiming emergency surgery expenses. Emergency surgeries are covered after the 60-day waiting period.
Customer has a Vehicle Standard policy that expired last month. The customer is claiming accident repair costs from an accident that occurred yesterday.
Customer has a Vehicle Premium policy with collision coverage active. The customer is claiming repair costs after an accident.
Customer has a Travel Shield policy and lost baggage during a covered international trip. Baggage loss is included in coverage.
Customer has a Travel Shield policy and cancelled the trip due to personal preference. Voluntary trip cancellations are excluded.
Customer has a Home Protect policy and is claiming flood damage. Flood coverage requires an additional flood rider, which the customer did not purchase.
Customer has a Home Protect Plus policy with an active flood rider and is claiming flood damage repair costs.
Customer has a Health Basic policy and is claiming dental surgery expenses. Dental procedures are excluded from the policy.
Customer has a Health Premium policy and is claiming emergency hospitalization expenses. Emergency hospitalization is covered under the policy.
Customer has a Vehicle Standard policy and is claiming vehicle theft. A police report was submitted as required by the policy.
Customer has a Vehicle Standard policy and is claiming vehicle theft but failed to submit a police report. A police report is mandatory.
Customer has a Life Secure policy active for 5 years and the beneficiary is claiming death benefits. The policy is fully active and premiums were paid.
Customer has a Life Secure policy but missed premium payments for 6 months, causing the policy to lapse. A death benefit claim was submitted during the lapsed period.
Customer has a Travel Premium policy and is claiming medical emergency expenses incurred abroad. International emergency medical expenses are covered.
